purpose: Evaluate the actual denied CT-42 factual runtime candidate through CT-40 without manufacturing missing release evidence.

commit_relationship.boundary: This pure adapter does not inspect Git history. It accepts independent review commits only when every declared scoped file hash matches the assembled candidate; any ancestry assertion belongs in CI with explicitly fetched refs.
